name: devproc
description: Provides skills and agents for software development process. Feature lifecycle: five skills to manage features through Pending → In Progress → Completed, with plan files and handoff notes for session continuity. Workflow orchestration: a top-level dev-process-manager agent (run via `claude --agent dev-process-manager`) that drives the feature workflow semi-autonomously, spawning teammates per sub-task and reviewing their work. Code review: three review skills (/review-full, /review-component, /review-branch) backed by four specialist agents (architectural, simplicity, general, nitty) that auto-apply code-level findings and escalate architectural changes for confirmation.
